features: PACK OF 4: Treat yourself with 4 bottles of this premium body wash featuring elements pink blossom and lotus flower
FEATURES: Dermatologist approved fragrance to leave your skin feeling clean, soft and delicately scented
LUXURY: Enjoy a marble-look packaging for that added touch of luxury in your daily shower routine
ECO-FRIENDLY: Vegan friendly formula packaged in reusable toiletries; A beautiful way to care for the planet while pampering yourself
GIFT IDEA: Perfect gift for friends and family, or as a luxurious treat for yourself after a long day
description: Product Description An exotic fragrance blend of lotus flower, pink fruits and coconut water. This luxurious body wash will leave your skin feeling beautifully cleansed, moisturised and silky smooth. Inspired by the most covetable trends in interior design, our sophisticated Elements collection references exquisite natural textures with striking marble tones. This premium collection complements every home, from urban glam to Nordic simplicity and sleek minimalism. An exotic fragrance blend of lotus flower, pink fruits and coconut water infused with nourishing Vitamin E. Both refreshing, floral and a touch of tropical to uplift the senses. Ingredients Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Lactic Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Citric Acid, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Sodium Hydroxide, Hexylene Glycol. Directions Lather & Rinse Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. If product gets in the eyes rinse immediately with clean warm water. Excessive use or prolonged exposure can cause irritation to skin and urinary tract. If skin irritation occurs discontinue use. If irritation persists consult your doctor. Manufacturer Contact Information Nash Road, Redditch, B98 7AS See more
